case_title: A-ONE RENT-A-CAR, INC. VS. ALAN TROY MARQUEZ et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF A-ONE RENT-A-CAR, INC.

DEFAULT PROVE-UP HEARING HELD THURSDAY, 26FEB04 IN D-622 FROM D-218 UNCONTESTED CALENDAR; MICHAEL HEATH, ESQ. APPEARS FOR PLAINTIFF; NO APPEARANCE BY OR FOR DEFENDANT ALAN TROY MARQUEZ; AFTER ENTERTAINING TESTIMONY BY PLAINTIFF COUNSEL HEATH, THE COURT ORDERS JUDGMENT ENTERED IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF AND AGAINST DEFENDANT IN THE AMOUNT OF $7,239.75 FOR DAMAGES AND $380.30 FOR COSTS FOR A TOTAL JUDGMENT OF $7,620.05 AGAINST DEFENDANT ALAN TROY MARQUEZ. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. JUDGE: HON. J. AUGUSTUS ACCURSO, VISITING JUDGE; REPORTER: JOYCE LONG, CSR; CLERK: MARJORIE MANZELLA (D-622, THURS., 26FEB2004).
